name: HLPPRG
label: HA-1 Ever Received Medical Help to Get Pregnant
universe: Applicable if R has ever had sexual intercourse with a male (rhadsex = 1) or is 18 years or older (age_r >= 18)

name: SEEKCURR
label: HA-2 Sought medical help to get pregnant in current union
universe: Applicable if R reported any medical help to become pregnant (HA-1 HLPPRG = 1), and R is currently married, cohabiting, or separated from a man (RMARIT = 1 or 2 or FMARIT = 4) or married or cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 1 or 2).

name: TYPALLPG_1
label: HA-3 Infertility Services Received - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if R reported ever seeking any medical help to get pregnant (HA-1 HLPPRG = 1)

distribution.label: Infertility testing on your husband or male partner
In vitro fertilization (IVF) or other assisted reproductive
Surgery or drug treatment for endometriosis
Surgery or drug treatment for uterine fibroids
Other medical help for you to become pregnant

name: TRYLONG2
label: HA-8 How long tried to get pregnant before first went for medical help

label: HA-8 Unit (months/years) for how long tried to get pregnant before first went for medical help

name: HLPPGNOW

universe: Applicable if R's age at first visit for medical help getting pregnant (HA-7 FRSTHELP) was not within 1 year of current age
